docs.text: dd-transfer-to-vault-cli ¶ Provides the transfer command to interact with dd-transfer-to-vault service via its REST API . SYNOPSIS ¶ transfer -p <pipeline> flush-work-to-vault transfer -p <pipeline> status [ -a | --all-batches ] For more information on a subcommand use: transfer <subcommand> --help
docs.title: Introduction

docs.text: Installation ¶ Currently this project is built as an RPM package for RHEL7/CentOS7 and later. The RPM will install the binaries to /opt/dans.knaw.nl/dd-transfer-to-vault-cli and the configuration files to /etc/opt/dans.knaw.nl/dd-transfer-to-vault-cli . Building from source ¶ Prerequisites: Java 11 or higher Maven 3.3.3 or higher RPM Steps: git clone https://github.com/DANS-KNAW/dd-transfer-to-vault-cli.git cd dd-transfer-to-vault-cli mvn clean install
docs.title: Installation
